reviews.comment:
Siempre atienden bien en la estación del ACA. Todos los muchachos dueños bien. Tiene carga de aire gratis, cosa que la YPF del Ala no, hay que pagar. Los baños, también bastante bien. Limpios. Se pide la llave a los muchachos de los surtidores de combustible. Y el bar también está bueno, y tiene muy buena variedad de productos y bebidas.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the ACA station is always good. All the owners are friendly. They offer free air conditioning, which YPF doesn't offer at Ala; you have to pay. The bathrooms are also quite good. Clean. You have to ask the staff at the fuel pumps for the key. And the bar is also good, with a great variety of products and drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOXYtYzJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En este lugar hay un problema, a la mañana cuando los playeros cierran las dársenas de carga, por algún motivo que desconozco,( posiblemente controles de los tanques) no te dejan entrar y estacionar para entrar a comprar un café, es la tercera vez que me pasa, la única estación  que no te deja entrar. A ver si resuelven eso, no sean tan aparatos.

(Translated by Google)
There's a problem here. In the morning, when the attendants close the loading bays, for some reason I don't know (possibly fuel tank checks), they don't let you in to park and buy a coffee. It's the third time this has happened to me; it's the only station that won't let you in. They need to fix this; they shouldn't be so inconsiderate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlZ3BQNzVBRRAB
